title: Arcticraft
description: An exploration modpack turning the world into an arctic wasteland.
body:
![Arcticraft Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88e9af9258fe3bba3b7f7767193c0092d371680d.jpeg)

## Info
### Whats it about?
Arcticraft is an exploration modpack turning the world into a snowy and unforgiving wasteland. The modpack is inspired by a hardcore movie on YouTube.

### Can i edit this modpack?
You are allowed to edit this modpack, but do not under ANY circumstances republish it without permission.

### Is it laggy?
Most of the time no, i have a bunch of performance stuff installed. The game runs smoothly at 60fps at 32 render distance.
